title: Indigo® Wired Edge Christmas Ribbon – Red & Black Tartan Check Design, 63 mm x 45.7 m Roll | Gift Wrapping, Bows, Crafts & Party Decorations
features: 📏 Generous Size – 63 mm wide × 45.7 m long roll for multiple festive projects.
🎀 Wired Edge Design – Strong, flexible edges for bows and decorations that hold shape.
🟥 Red & Black Tartan Pattern – Classic rustic style, perfect for farmhouse and festive décor.
💎 Durable Polyester – High-quality material for long-lasting use and a professional finish.
🎉 Versatile Use – Ideal for gift wrapping, wreaths, hampers, garlands, and Christmas decorations.
